pi_items.source: Task instructions explicitly request setting the port to 8444.
Task instructions explicitly request checking 'Automatically redirect HTTP requests to HTTPS'.
Task instructions explicitly request checking 'Run ADAudit Plus in Safe Mode (https)'.

Verified from install_adaudit_plus.ps1 which sets the installation directory to C:\Program Files\ManageEngine\ADAudit Plus. ManageEngine ADAudit Plus uses Apache Tomcat, whose configuration file is stored in conf\server.xml.
Task instructions explicitly request creating the summary at this path.
Task instructions explicitly request saving the screenshot to this path.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring ManageEngine ADAudit Plus to use HTTPS on port 8444, enabling HTTP to HTTPS redirection, and saving the configuration. The ADAudit Plus installation directory is C:\Program Files\ManageEngine\ADAudit Plus, and its web server configuration is stored in conf\server.xml. The expected summary file path is C:\workspace\https_config_summary.txt and the screenshot path is C:\workspace\https_config_result.png, matching the task instructions.
